# Don't Post Issues on GitHub
## Bug Reports or Feature Requests
Please do not post issues to our repositories on
[GitHub](https://github.com/elypia).  
You can create them on [GitLab](https://gitlab.com/groups/Elypia/-/issues) instead!

[GitLab](https://gitlab.com/) is itself part of the open-source community
and can be self-hosted should the need ever arrise.

## Questions
If you have questions or need support, please go to the [support](SUPPORT.md) document.
